---
reference: inspect_ai.viewer
description: Customize Inspect view behavior.
---

## Viewer
### ViewerConfig

## Scanner Results
### ScannerResultView

## Sample Score View
### SampleScoreView
### SampleScoreViewSort

## Samples View
### SamplesView
### SamplesColumn
### SamplesSort

## Fields
### MetadataField
### ScannerResultField
